title: Complete a custom topic debate session end-to-end to final verdict
description: Verifies a guest user can start a debate from a custom topic, observe loading/research, see three rounds play out, and reach a final verdict panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a custom debate topic into the topic field
Submit the start debate action
Wait for the debate arena to load with generated content
Wait for the debate to progress through all rounds until completion
Verify the debate shows two agents with generated debate content
Verify a final verdict panel is displayed for the completed debate

title: Auto-plays both agents sequentially and advances round progress
description: Verifies that starting a debate plays agent 1 then automatically transitions to agent 2 and advances the round progress indicator through rounds without manual intervention.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Solar power subsidies
Click to start the debate
Wait for audio playback to begin
Wait for the UI to indicate the active speaker has switched from agent 1 to agent 2
Verify the round progress indicator advances to the next round after both agents finish speaking for the round

title: Final verdict panel renders after debate completion
description: Verifies that after the full debate ends the final verdict panel appears to present the post-debate analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Social media regulation
Click to start the debate
Wait for all rounds to complete
Verify the final verdict panel is displayed

title: Pause and resume keeps captions aligned with audio
description: Verifies that pausing and resuming playback during an agent segment resumes both audio and captions without losing synchronization or restarting unexpectedly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Universal basic income
Click to start the debate
Wait for agent 1 audio playback to begin
Pause playback
Wait briefly
Resume playback
Verify audio and captions both resume progressing from the paused point rather than restarting or desynchronizing

title: Fact-check overlay appears after a round and can be dismissed
description: Verifies that after a round completes a fact-check overlay appears with a verdict badge and explanation and the user can dismiss it via backdrop to continue the debate.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Nuclear energy safety
Click to start the debate
Wait for the end of the first round
Wait for the fact-check overlay to appear
Click the backdrop to dismiss the overlay
Verify the overlay is no longer visible and debate playback can continue

title: Captions reveal word-by-word during playback
description: Verifies that during active audio playback the live captions reveal progressively rather than appearing all at once.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Remote work productivity
Click to start the debate
Wait for agent 1 audio playback to begin
Observe the captions area for a few moments during playback
Verify the captions update progressively over time while audio is playing

title: Start a debate from a trending topic selection
description: Verifies selecting a trending topic can auto-fill the topic and successfully start debate generation to show agent content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a trending topic chip to populate the topic field
Submit the start debate action
Wait for the debate arena to load with generated content
Verify the generated debate content is displayed in both agent areas
Verify the debate shows round progression indicators for the session

title: Final verdict includes six claim cards with verdict badges and summary and tally
description: Verifies that the final verdict panel contains six claim cards each with a verdict badge, along with a verdict summary and a per-speaker tally scorecard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Public transit funding
Click to start the debate
Wait for the final verdict panel to appear at debate completion
Verify there are six claim cards displayed and each shows a verdict badge
Verify a verdict summary section and a per-speaker tally scorecard are displayed

title: Start a debate from a news article selection
description: Verifies choosing a news article can initiate debate generation and display the debate content in the arena.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the news feed section
Click the action to start a debate from a visible news card
Wait for the debate arena to load with generated content
Verify the debate arena displays generated content for two agents
Verify the topic field is populated from the selected article

title: Trending topics load and are selectable
description: Verifies the trending topic chips are displayed on Home and selecting one updates the topic input.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the trending topics section
Verify multiple trending topic chips are displayed
Click a trending topic chip
Verify the topic field is populated with the selected trending topic

title: Pausing near speaker transition does not duplicate or overlap audio
description: Verifies that pausing shortly before the agent switch and then resuming results in a single clean transition to the next speaker without overlapping playback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Electric vehicles emissions
Click to start the debate
Wait for agent 1 to be close to finishing their segment
Pause playback
Resume playback
Verify there is only one active speaker at a time and the UI transitions cleanly to the next speaker without duplicated playback

title: Filter news by country and see results update
description: Verifies selecting a country filter updates the visible news cards to reflect the chosen country.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the news feed section
Select a country from the country filter dropdown
Wait for the news grid to refresh
Verify news cards are displayed for the selected country filter

title: Fact-check overlay shows verdict badge and explanation content
description: Verifies that each fact-check overlay contains a visible verdict badge and an explanation text block for the checked claim.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Vaccine mandates
Click to start the debate
Wait for the fact-check overlay to appear after a round completes
Verify the overlay shows a verdict badge and an explanation text

title: Start a debate from a filtered news feed item
description: Verifies after applying a country filter, the user can still start a debate from a visible news card and see debate content render.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the news feed section
Select a country from the country filter dropdown
Wait for the news grid to refresh
Click the action to start a debate from a visible news card
Wait for the debate arena to load with generated content
Verify the debate arena displays generated content for two agents

title: Download combined audio after completing a debate
description: Verifies a guest can complete a debate and download a single combined MP3 for the full session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a non-empty topic into the topic field
Start the debate
Wait for the debate to complete
Initiate the audio download
Verify an MP3 file download starts

title: Starting a new debate replaces the prior debate session
description: Verifies the user can start a second debate after one has begun and the UI reflects the new session rather than mixing states.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a custom debate topic into the topic field
Submit the start debate action
Wait for the debate arena to load with generated content
Fill a different custom debate topic into the topic field
Submit the start debate action
Verify the debate arena shows a single active debate session state (not duplicated)

title: Fact-check overlay auto-dismisses and debate resumes
description: Verifies that the fact-check overlay automatically dismisses after its announcement completes and the debate continues without user interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: Carbon taxes
Click to start the debate
Wait for the fact-check overlay to appear after a round completes
Wait for the overlay to auto-dismiss
Verify the overlay disappears and debate playback proceeds to the next segment

title: Ticker headlines render on initial load
description: Verifies the live news ticker shows at least one headline on the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live news ticker to finish initial loading
Verify at least one ticker headline is displayed

title: Load more news cards to extend the feed
description: Verifies pagination works by loading additional news cards into the grid when requested.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the news feed section
Note the current set of visible news cards
Click the action to load more news
Wait for additional news cards to appear
Verify the news feed shows more items than before

title: Waveform indicates active playback and stops when paused
description: Verifies that the animated waveform reflects playback state by animating during audio and stopping when playback is paused.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a specific custom topic into the topic field: AI in education
Click to start the debate
Wait for audio playback to begin
Pause playback
Verify the waveform is animated during playback and is not animated while paused

title: Start debate in a selected non-default language
description: Verifies selecting a language before starting generation results in debate content presented in that language.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a non-default language from the language dropdown
Fill a non-empty topic into the topic field
Start the debate
Verify the debate content is displayed in the selected language

title: Changing language affects the next generated debate
description: Verifies switching the selected language and starting a new debate updates the language of the newly generated debate.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a non-default language from the language dropdown
Fill a non-empty topic into the topic field
Start the debate
Wait for the debate to complete
Select a different language from the language dropdown
Start a new debate
Verify the new debate content is displayed in the newly selected language

title: Trending topic selection persists in topic input until changed
description: Verifies after selecting a trending chip, the user can edit the topic input and the edited value remains ready for starting a debate.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the trending topics section
Click a trending topic chip
Fill additional text into the topic field to modify the selected topic
Verify the topic field contains the modified topic value

title: Pause and open a ticker headline in a new tab
description: Verifies a guest can pause the live ticker and open a headline in a new tab successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live news ticker headlines to appear at the bottom of the page
Hover over the ticker area
Click a ticker headline
Verify a new browser tab opens with an article page

title: Ticker headline click is not blocked by hover-to-pause
description: Verifies a user can hover to pause and still click a headline to open it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for ticker headlines to appear at the bottom of the page
Hover over the ticker area to pause it
Click a ticker headline while still hovering
Verify a new browser tab opens with an article page

title: Download control is available only after debate completion
description: Verifies the audio download option is not available until the debate has finished.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a non-empty topic into the topic field
Start the debate
Verify the audio download option is not available while the debate is in progress
Wait for the debate to complete
Verify the audio download option is available after completion

title: Prevent starting a debate with an empty topic
description: Verifies starting debate generation is blocked when the topic field is empty and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Clear the topic field
Submit the start debate action
Verify a topic validation error is visible
Verify debate generation does not start and no debate content is shown

title: Ticker resumes scrolling after hover ends
description: Verifies the live news ticker pauses on hover and resumes motion when the pointer leaves.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for ticker headlines to appear at the bottom of the page
Hover over the ticker area
Move the pointer away from the ticker area
Verify the ticker is moving again

title: Language selection persists through in-page interactions before starting
description: Verifies the selected language remains chosen while the user interacts with the page before starting debate generation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a non-default language from the language dropdown
Scroll down the page and then back to the debate controls
Fill a non-empty topic into the topic field
Start the debate
Verify the debate content is displayed in the selected language

title: Trending topics remain visible while interacting with other Home sections
description: Verifies the trending chip area remains usable after scrolling through other sections on Home.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the trending topics section
Scroll to the news feed section
Scroll back to the trending topics section
Verify trending topic chips are still displayed and interactive

title: Ticker remains usable after interacting with the page
description: Verifies the live news ticker remains visible and interactive after the user scrolls and returns to the bottom area.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for ticker headlines to appear at the bottom of the page
Scroll down the page
Scroll to the bottom area where the ticker is visible
Verify the ticker is still displayed with headlines

title: Download can be initiated repeatedly after completion
description: Verifies a user can initiate the combined MP3 download more than once after the debate finishes.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a non-empty topic into the topic field
Start the debate
Wait for the debate to complete
Initiate the audio download
Initiate the audio download again
Verify an MP3 file download starts

title: Handle empty news feed state gracefully
description: Verifies that if the news feed section has no cards, an empty state is shown rather than a broken layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the news feed section
Select a country from the country filter dropdown
Wait for the news grid to refresh
Verify either news cards are displayed or an empty state message is visible
